title: Protected Places and Areas (Protected Areas) Order, 1983
title_en: Protected Places and Areas (Protected Areas) Order, 1983

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Protected Places and Areas (Protected Areas) Order.

The Forest Reserves specified in the Schedule to this Order and all the adjacent uninhabited areas are hereby declared to be protected areas for the purposes of the Protected Places and Areas Act 1 . 1 Cap. 74 Schedule 1. Sao Hill Forest Reserve. 2. Gulusilo Forest Reserve. 3. Irundi Forest Reserve. 4. Kigogo Forest Reserve. 5. Msiwasi Forest Reserve. 6. Mufindi Escarpment Forest Reserve. 7. Mkewe Forest Reserve. 8. Mgololo Forest Reserve. 9. Mninga Forest Reserve. 10. Mbalwe-Mfukulembe Forest Reserve.
